title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Dedicated Freight Corridor - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Dedicated Freight Corridor - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Dedicated Freight Corridor invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Mysuru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Dedicated Freight Corridor:
Dedicated Freight Corridor is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dedicated Freight Corridor!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
